text:
流石<%me>！
大活躍、ちゃんと見てたよ！

新エリアの探索とは思えないくらい
手慣れた動き、やっぱり経験の為せる
動きってやつなのかしら。

アンタやっぱり
最高にカッコいいア

You nailed it, <%me>!
I saw all your hard work paying off!

You looked like you knew the area like
you'd grown up in the area. Those kind of
moves only come from serious experience!
I've gotta say, you're the coolest of the ARKS!
